summary: StoryChainTimeline Competition-First Redesign (Phase C) testing complete. All features verified: Player rank card shows correctly for #1 (emerald) and non-leader (rose), Winner Spotlight with metrics and CTAs, expandable branches, View Battle navigation, Beat This Version opens ContinuationModal in branch mode, ContinuationModal isWar prop correctly routes to /api/war/enter in DailyWarPage and /api/stories/continue-branch in StoryChainTimeline.
critical_code_review_comments: StoryChainTimeline.jsx: Competition-first layout correctly implemented with ABOVE THE FOLD (player rank + winner spotlight) and BELOW THE FOLD (episode timeline + branches)
ContinuationModal.jsx: isWar prop correctly routes to /api/war/enter when true, /api/stories/continue-branch when false
DailyWarPage.jsx: Correctly passes isWar={true} to ContinuationModal for war entries

All data-testid attributes present: player-rank-card, winner-spotlight, winner-title, beat-this-version-btn, view-battle-btn, chain-beat-this-btn, viewer-cta, viewer-enter-btn, chain-stats, episode-timeline, episode-node-{i}, take-back-rank-btn
test_credentials: Test User: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026#, Admin: admin@creatorstudio.ai / Cr3@t0rStud!o#2026
seed_data_creation: Used existing battle-demo-root with 3 episodes + 3 branches. Test user is #1, Admin user is #2.
context_for_next_testing_agent: StoryChainTimeline Phase C fully tested. Key findings: (1) Player rank card shows 'You're #1!' with emerald color for leader, '#X' with rose color for non-leaders, (2) Winner Spotlight shows #1 Version badge, title, creator, metrics (views/shares/continues/pts), View Battle and Beat This Version CTAs, (3) Viewer CTA shows when user hasn't participated with 'Compete' button, (4) Episode timeline and branches are BELOW competition section, (5) Beat This Version opens ContinuationModal in branch mode with parent story context pre-filled, (6) ContinuationModal isWar prop routes to /api/war/enter (DailyWarPage) vs /api/stories/continue-branch (StoryChainTimeline), (7) All routes working: /app/story-chain-timeline/:storyId, /app/story-battle/:storyId, /app/war

story_chain_timeline_page.view_battle_btn: PASS - data-testid='view-battle-btn' present and navigates to /app/story-battle/:storyId
story_chain_timeline_page.episode_nodes: PASS - episode-node-0, episode-node-1, episode-node-2 all present
story_chain_timeline_page.expandable_branches: PASS - Clicking Origin expands to show 3 versions with branch-node-{i}
story_chain_timeline_page.open_battle_btn: PASS - data-testid='open-battle-btn' present in expanded branches

phase_c_competition_first_redesign.below_the_fold_structure: Episode timeline + expandable branches shown after
